shouldBeAlphanumeric: Should contain only letters and numerals
passwordFormatIncorrect: Password should have minimum eight characters, at least one capital letter and one number
userAlreadyExists: Email is invalid or already taken
error500: Oops, something went wrong and the server returned an error
nameAlphanumeric: Name should contain only letters, with single spaces, hyphens or apostrophes between words (e.g. "John Doe")
